title: UCSL ApprenticesRecruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Graduate, Technician, Trade Apprentices Posts
shortInfo: The Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) has released the official Graduate, Technician (Diploma), ITI Trade Apprentices Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026 at ucsl.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced under the UCSL Apprentices 2026 Recruitment. Eligible candidates aged 18 years and above with a qualification of ITI, Degree in Engineering/Technology, or Diploma in Engineering/Technology can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 17-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

basic_details.job_title: UCSL ApprenticesRecruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 20 Graduate, Technician, Trade Apprentices Posts
basic_details.short_information: The Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL) has released the official Graduate, Technician (Diploma), ITI Trade Apprentices Notification 2026 on 18-05-2026 at ucsl.in. A total of 20 vacancies have been announced under the UCSL Apprentices 2026 Recruitment. Eligible candidates aged 18 years and above with a qualification of ITI, Degree in Engineering/Technology, or Diploma in Engineering/Technology can apply online from 18-05-2026 to 17-06-2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years No maximum age limit is specified in the provided data. Age relaxation details are not provided.

qualification.education_qualification: ITI, Degree in Engineering/Technology or Diploma in Engineering/Technology
qualification.details: Mechanical Engineering (Graduate): A Degree in Engineering or Technology granted by a Statutory University or Institution empowered by an Act of Parliament or equivalent recognized by State/Central Government. Electrical Engineering (Graduate): A Degree in Engineering or Technology granted by a Statutory University or Institution empowered by an Act of Parliament or equivalent recognized by State/Central Government. Mechanical Engineering (Diploma): A Diploma in Engineering or Technology granted by a State Council or Board of Technical Education or University or equivalent recognized by State/Central Government. Electrical Engineering (Diploma): A Diploma in Engineering or Technology granted by a State Council or Board of Technical Education or University or equivalent recognized by State/Central Government. ITI Trade Apprentices: Pass in X standard. Pass in ITI in the concerned trade

salary_details.details: Graduate Apprentices: Rs. 15,000 Per Month (Stipend & Meals allowance) Technician (Diploma) Apprentices: Rs. 13,200 Per Month (Stipend & Meals allowance) ITI Trade Apprentices: 12,600 Stipend, & Meals allowance

selection_process: Certificate Verification Merit/Reservation based selection Medical Fitness
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 17-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of UCSL to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for UCSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for UCSL Graduate/Technician (Diploma) Apprentices posts is 17 June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for UCSL Apprenticeship?
faq.answer: There are a total of 20 vacancies for Graduate/Technician (Diploma) Apprentices posts released by Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for UCSL Apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 18 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for Graduate Apprentices at UCSL?
faq.answer: Graduate Apprentices will receive a stipend of Rs. 15,000 per month, which includes meals allowance.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for Technician (Diploma) Apprentices at UCSL?
faq.answer: Technician (Diploma) Apprentices will receive a stipend of Rs. 13,200 per month, which includes meals allowance.

faq.question: Q6. What are the educational qualifications required for UCSL Apprenticeship?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Degree in Engineering/Technology for Graduate posts and a Diploma in Engineering/Technology for Technician posts.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application mode for UCSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for UCSL Recruitment 2026 is strictly online.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for UCSL Apprenticeship?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Certificate Verification, Merit/Reservation based selection, and Medical Fitness.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for UCSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned for General/OBC categories, implying it is Nil.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for UCSL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Official Notification PDF' link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
